name: Nick Jones | House of Wax
description:
Just recently watched House of Wax with a few friends! I looked away at every single gorey scene because I'm a wuss with horror movies, but I loved the movie and it did a good job at scaring us.

Nick's character is a cool one to me. The way he dropped the crossbow still angers me, though.
creator: HiIAmMentallyUnwell
